name: bgs
description: BG Service internal Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: nzoom-assistant
plugins.description: nZoom assistant skills: automations (АД), analyses (справки), documentation navigation, configuration and SQL conventions

plugins.name: nzoom-documenter
plugins.description: nZoom documentation writer (developer-time): analyzes the code and writes or audits docs — module READMEs, in-code docblocks, and settings .dist docs — surfacing whatever it cannot trace for you to resolve in-code. For developers working in a nZoom checkout.
